string.text: Shame about %s, poor guy. Walked into a bad spot in %s, the %s are in mourning.
Heard what happened to %s in %s. Doesn't matter the faction, it's still a life lost. My respects to the %s.
Poor %s, saw him once. Fell in %s, he was with the %s, seemed like a decent kid.
Ha, glad to hear it. %s had it coming in %s. He was with the %s, a real pain in the ass.
One less to worry about. %s ended up in %s. He was scum from the %s, good riddance.
%s won't bother anyone else in %s. The %s lost one, and I couldn't care less.
I'm listening... %s fell in %s, was with the %s. Never spoke to him, but in the Zone death's always around the corner.
What can you do. %s fell in %s. The %s are probably regrouping. Life goes on.
Heard about %s in %s. Hope the %s know how to look after themselves.
Feel bad about %s. Fell in %s, was with the %s, young guy. Nobody deserves to die like that.
Poor %s. Doesn't matter what faction, when someone falls in %s we're all stalkers. Respect to the %s.
%s, one less life in %s. Was with the %s, but in the end we're all brothers in the Zone.
Sad news, brother. %s fell in %s, was with the %s. Send my condolences to the squad.
Heard about %s. Fell in %s, was one of the %s boys. The Zone's a real bitch.
Well deserved. %s suffered out there in %s. Was with the %s, hope it was painful.
Can I borrow your rifle to go celebrate? %s bit the dust in %s. He was with the %s, great news.
You don't know how happy this makes me. %s ain't bothering anyone. Fell in %s, was with the %s. Good on whoever did it.
%s bites the dust in %s. Was with the %s, had it coming. The Zone is just.
Ha, doesn't surprise me. %s fell in %s like the dog he was. His days were numbered, he was with the %s.
Heard about %s in %s. Was with the %s. The Zone claims another victim.
%s down in %s, of the %s. Noted. No opinion, just stating the fact.
Life goes on. %s is in an eternal sleep in %s now. Was with the %s, may there be peace for him.
Noted. %s died in %s, former member of the %s. May he rest in the beyond.
Heard the report. %s in %s, of the %s. We all end up the same in this cursed land.
